certification: proxy gateway mode — live against Microsoft Graph via Nango
surface: POST $REVIVE_URL/proxy/<provider-path> with Authorization + X-Revive-Connection-Id (+ Run-Id for mutations)

checks.mutationLedger: POST sentitems message → HTTP 201, x-revive-ledger: committed, action id issued
checks.replayBlockedAtWire: identical POST → HTTP 200, x-revive-replay: blocked, stored object returned, NO second create at the provider
checks.staleWorkerFenced: X-Revive-Lease-Generation: 1 with lease at 2 → HTTP 409 blocked_stale_generation, provider never called

pythonClient: protect_action exactly-once verified live (1 execution across 2 calls); credential failure opened a recovery case with a signed URL
caveats: 401-credential-failure proxy path exercised via SDK/case route, not by revoking the live grant; JSON request bodies only
